ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the District Health Board submitting the report */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases reported */,
  "probable_cases" INTEGER /* Number of probable cases reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease being reported */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of report */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* User who submitted the report */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Laboratory associated with the report */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Verification status of the report */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was verified */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhbs" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the DHB */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the DHB */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the DHB */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the DHB entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the DHB entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the DHB entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* Typical incubation period of the disease */,
  "mortality_rate" TEXT /* Average mortality rate of the disease */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the disease entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the disease entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the disease entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report type entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report type entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the report type entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the report */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_reports" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original report */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the report */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the changes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the historical report entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical report entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related report */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., spike in cases, increase in deaths) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the alert entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data source entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data source entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the status entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_status_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the notification entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to perform the action */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the audit trail entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the feedback */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feedback entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training material */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the training material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the training document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the training material entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the training material entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the training material entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)
